name: Candy Bar Brownies
recipeIngredient: 3 1.55 oz Hershey's milk chocolate bars, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine eggs, sugar, melted butter, and vanilla extract in a large bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, combine flour, baking powder, and cocoa powder.
3. Stir the dry ingredients into the sugar mixture until well combined.
4. Gently fold in the coarsely chopped Snickers bars.
5. Pour the batter into a greased and floured 13 x 9-inch pan.
6. Sprinkle the finely chopped milk chocolate bars on top of the batter.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 32 minutes, or until set.
Note: Do not use aggressive culinary slang in following these instructions.
